prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年苏州大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7892名、7421名、7361名、7491名、6896名。2021–2023年呈逐年小幅上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年略有回落，2025年大幅回升至6896名，为近5年最佳成绩，显示2025年报考热度明显升温；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年11人、2022年11人、2023年10人、2024年9人、2025年10人。2026年计划扩至14人，较2025年增加4人，扩招幅度达40%，为近年最大扩招，对考生是重大利好信号，理论上使录取位次数字增大（更易进入）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第40–46名（2026年排名第46），属于全国百强中上游水平，综合实力强劲，在非985的211高校中位居前列；2024年声誉偏正面（食堂宿舍改善获好评）；2026年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件引发关注）。抖音热度排名第46（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上。历史投档异常记录中未见苏州大学断档信号，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，体育学A-、药学A-为该校A-及以上学科。招生专业中临床医学（5+3一体化）对应临床医学学科（B+），法学对应法学（B+），软件工程/人工智能对应计算机科学与技术（B+），纳米材料与技术对应材料科学与工程（B+），整体学科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热；法学分化观望；新闻传播明显劝退。北京市2021–2025年考生总数持续增长（42037→44958→55201→55936→65434），2026年进一步增至84900人，增幅约29.7%，竞争环境显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至6896名的强势走势、2026年招生计划扩招40%的重大利好、以及北京市考生总数同比大增约29.7%的竞争加剧压力，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，竞争环境整体略有缓解但幅度有限。2026年声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度。预测2026年最低录取位次约8501名，较2025年6896名后移约1605名（位次数字增大），反映扩招带来的录取门槛下降；区间8001–9001名。

- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 纳米材料与技术
- 汉语言文学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 法学
- 人工智能
- 软件工程

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年苏州大学在北京市大幅扩招至14人，预测位次区间8001–9001名。位次在8000名以内可重点冲刺一档临床医学（5+3一体化）和纳米材料与技术等热门专业；位次在8001–8500名区间建议以二档法学、人工智能、软件工程为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在8501–9001名区间建议以二档专业为主、三档保底；位次在9001名以后可考虑三档专业并关注征集志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 7892, 7421, 7361, 7491, and 6896 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a slight decline in 2024, and a significant rebound to 6896 in 2025, the best result in the past five years, indicating a marked increase in application popularity in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Beijing: 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands to 14, an increase of 4 from 2025, a 40% expansion, the largest in recent years, which is a significant positive signal for candidates, theoretically making the admission ranking number larger (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 40–46 in recent years (ranked 46th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100, with strong comprehensive strength, leading among non-985 Project 211 universities. In 2024, its reputation was relatively positive (improvements in canteens and dormitories received praise). In 2026, its reputation is relatively negative (campus safety incidents have attracted attention). Its Douyin popularity ranks 46th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. No signs of admission gaps have been observed in historical abnormal admission records, and the admission trend is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education (A-) and Pharmacy (A-) are the university's A- and above disciplines. Among the admission majors, Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) corresponds to Clinical Medicine (B+), Law corresponds to Law (B+), Software Engineering/Artificial Intelligence corresponds to Computer Science and Technology (B+), and Nanomaterials and Technology corresponds to Materials Science and Engineering (B+), with overall balanced disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society. Law is experiencing differentiation and wait-and-see. Journalism and Communication are clearly being discouraged. The total number of candidates in Beijing from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously increasing (42037 → 44958 → 55201 → 55936 → 65434), and in 2026 it further increases to 84900, an increase of about 29.7%, significantly intensifying the competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of the ranking rebounding to 6896 in 2025, the major positive of a 40% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition pressure from a year-on-year increase of about 29.7% in the total number of candidates in Beijing, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the candidate growth rate, and the overall competitive environment is slightly eased but to a limited extent. The negative reputation in 2026 may slightly suppress application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 8501, moving back about 1605 places (ranking number increases) from 6896 in 2025, reflecting the lowering of the admission threshold due to expansion; the range is 8001–9001.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Nanomaterials and Technology
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law
- Artificial Intelligence
- Software Engineering
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Sociology
- Philosophy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Soochow University significantly expands enrollment in Beijing to 14, with a predicted ranking range of 8001–9001. Candidates with rankings within 8000 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) and Nanomaterials and Technology. Candidates in the 8001–8500 range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors like Law, Artificial Intelligence, and Software Engineering, while also considering sprinting for Tier 1. Candidates in the 8501–9001 range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with rankings after 9001 can consider Tier 3 majors and pay attention to supplementary admission opportunities.
